title: Plan downgrade blocked symptom (Billing)
summary: Resolve "plan downgrade blocked" — symptom for the Billing surface.

content.text:
## Symptom

An operation against the Billing surface fails with an error matching "plan downgrade blocked (symptom)".

## Resolution

1. Inspect the error envelope.
2. Re-issue with corrected parameters.
3. Confirm via the audit log.

See the [Billing API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get) for the exact field set.
